title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 51.  DATABASE SECURITY BREACH NOTIFICATION LAW

§3071.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Database Security Breach Notification Law".

Acts 2005, No. 499, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2006.
